items.title: Solana treasury firm Solmate says RockawayX campaign damaged shareholder value
items.whyYouShouldCare: The RockawayX campaign's negative impact on Solmate's shareholder value raises concerns about investor confidence and the overall stability of the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Can Solana survive its latest slip under $70? These 2 metrics signal…
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's drop below $70 highlights critical metrics that could influence liquidity and market sentiment, affecting its competitive positioning.

items.title: Upheaval at the Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto’s biggest names feeling bullish
items.whyYouShouldCare: Positive sentiment from major figures in crypto regarding Ethereum's upheaval could indirectly benefit Solana by shifting attention and investment towards alternative ecosystems.
